directive: MAXIMALITY STRENGTHENING: sharpen thm:low-latent-minor-attainment at the exact endpoint gamma=K. Prove compatible full-row-rank attainment iff u <= m^K, equivalently iff Delta_{K,m,u}(K) >= 0. Construct strictly positive linearly independent columns P(U=v | A=a,Z=z) separately for each treatment arm; because S_{K,alpha}=L2_P(A,Z), injectivity reduces blockwise to ordinary conditional-table column rank. Carry the nonzero maximal-minor argument through to relative Zariski-open and Euclidean-dense generic attainment. This must strictly improve the current condition 2u <= m^K+1 on (m^K+1)/2 < u <= m^K. Add an exact-gamma=K corollary or faithfully extend the target theorem without weakening the existing general-gamma sufficient result. SYNC ALL PROSE FIELDS: def:compatible-minor-handle, tldr, project_justification gap/niche/fill, related_work, novelty_justification, technical limitation, honest_scope, theorem gaps/consumers, and comparator_promise_table must distinguish (i) exact iff attainment at gamma=K, (ii) sufficient attainment for 2u <= m^gamma+1, and (iii) the remaining open nonnegative-slack regime for gamma<K. Preserve the selected cardinality-gamma full-cell component and Assumption-5-only route caveat; no ATE-nonidentification or generic polynomial-program claim.
